title: Kitchen Safety
description: Learn essential kitchen safety tips to prevent accidents while cooking.
steps: Always wash your hands before handling food.
Keep raw meat separate from other foods.
Use oven mitts when handling hot pots and pans.
Be aware of your surroundings while cooking to avoid accidents.
safety_tips: Have a fire extinguisher nearby in case of emergencies.
Know how to handle kitchen knives safely.
Keep the kitchen clean to prevent slips and falls.
